# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests and includes the PR title and description in build notifications. Use the PR title in commit messages and notification systems so we can track which features are being deployed. This helps with our release notes automation.
# Category: cicd_security

name: PR Build and Notification

on:
  pull_request:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v3

    - name: Set up Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v3
      with:
        node-version: '14'

    - name: Install dependencies
      run: npm install

    - name: Run build
      run: npm run build

    - name: Extract PR info
      id: pr_info
      run: |
        echo "PR_TITLE=$(echo '${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}')" >> $GITHUB_ENV
        echo "PR_BODY=$(echo '${{ github.event.pull_request.body }}')" >> $GITHUB_ENV

    - name: Commit build changes
      run: |
        git config --local user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
        git config --local user.name "github-actions[bot]"
        git add .
        git commit -m "Build from PR: ${{ env.PR_TITLE }}"

  notify:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build

    steps:
    - name: Send notifications
      run: |
        echo "PR Title: ${{ needs.build.outputs.PR_TITLE }}"
        echo "PR Description: ${{ needs.build.outputs.PR_BODY }}"
        # Replace with actual notification steps/services
        # e.g., curl command to send notifications
